description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic scene featuring two human figures, one seated and the other standing, both rendered in a rough, expressive style. The standing figure holds a long, slender staff, which extends vertically and adds a sense of movement and direction to the composition. The figures appear to be emerging from or interacting with a textured, organic base that suggests terrain or a natural environment. The surface is uneven and rugged, with visible tool marks and a matte finish, giving the piece a raw, tactile quality. The coloration is predominantly dark gray with lighter, earthy tones on the staff and parts of the base, enhancing the sense of depth and contrast. The overall form is elongated and asymmetrical, with the figures and staff creating a strong vertical and diagonal emphasis.
description: A rugged, expressive sculpture of two human figures, one standing with a staff and one seated, emerging from a textured base with dark and earthy tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing both figures clearly, with the standing figure holding a staff and the seated figure partially reclined on the textured base.
description_view_1: Frontal view emphasizing the vertical staff and the narrow profile of the standing figure, with less detail visible on the seated figure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the elongated base and the interaction between the two figures, with the staff prominently angled.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the standing figure and the rough, organic texture of the base, with minimal detail of the figures' faces.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures with a staff in an expressive, textured style
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
